comments.author: @RealLifeExplorer.US26
comments.text: Gross National Happiness isn't just a gimmick—you really feel that calm, peaceful energy the second you step foot in the country. Absolutely magical place!

comments.author: @globalatlasus
comments.text: Archery targets placed at 145 meters?! That’s more than double the Olympic distance.

comments.author: @GiangBùi-k6l2q
comments.text: The hike up to Tiger’s Nest Monastery is tough, but that view clinging to the cliff makes you completely forget the tiredness!

comments.author: @RealLifeFilesDoc
comments.text: The scriptwriting here is incredibly profound. In a world completely obsessed with endless economic growth and GDP, learning that a country officially evaluates government policies based on mental well-being and ecological preservation (GNH) [01:21] is a massive paradigm shift. It completely redefines what a "successful" nation looks like. To answer the question at the end: The fact that they are actually carbon negative, absorbing millions of tons more CO2 than they produce [02:41], surprised me the most. Incredible journalism! 👏
